author: jpeacock29
description: Cmd-click a Pandoc @citekey in your notes to open the cited PDF in Zotero at the page locator from the citation. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: jpeacock29
manifest.description: Cmd-click a Pandoc @citekey in your notes to open the cited PDF in Zotero at the page locator from the citation.
manifest.name: Zotero Cite Links

name: Zotero Cite Links

releases.author: jpeacock29
releases.description:
- Click affordance (solid underline + pointer cursor) now appears only while the click modifier (Cmd/Ctrl) is held over a citekey.
- README: explicit disclosure of localhost-only network use (Better BibTeX JSON-RPC), per Obsidian community plugin policies.

releases.author: jpeacock29
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Cmd-click a Pandoc `@citekey` in a note to open the cited PDF in Zotero at the page locator.
- Annotation-aware page-label offsetting (handles roman-numeral preface pages, etc.).
- Reading mode + live preview + source mode all supported.
- Command palette: "Open citation at cursor in Zotero", "Refresh Zotero library list".
- Settings: Zotero port, click modifier.
